entries.title: Lowest Tide Harbor Bed
entries.trigger: Lowest Tide ambience becomes active after the Tale establishes the public harbor board.
entries.purpose: Establish an exposed town listening across impossible tidal mud while leaving space for orientation, dialogue, and decisions.
layers: Mud crack release and restrained suction
Cold coastal wind with large quiet gaps
sonic_requirements: Dark maritime atmosphere without a constant low-frequency drone
Enough upper-mid texture to survive television speakers
Sparse events must randomize outside the seamless base loop
Spooky remains clearer; Grim adds weight; Gore & Dread adds only localized physical detail
negative_constraints: No required clue embedded in the loop

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce sparse transient range and mud impacts while preserving the returning-water and timber identity.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless layered ambience for an original drowned storybook harbor exposed at extreme low tide: distant returning sea, thin reflective tide pools, subtle mud crack release, sparse swollen timber strain, cold coastal wind, large quiet spaces, dark maritime folk horror, tactile and restrained, no speech, designed to sit beneath narration and local conversation.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: pirate harbor, cheerful seagulls, constant crashing waves, intelligible whispers, musical score, trailer boom, jump scare, extreme sub bass, obvious loop repetition, copyrighted melody
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Water, wet timber, rope, salt, and distant bell resonance behave like damaged memories while remaining tactile and mechanically readable.

entries.approval_boundary: Preproduction ambience brief only; no final loop, mix, loudness, implementation, or listening-test approval.

entries.title: Salt Market Canvas and Stall Bed
entries.trigger: A public camera or active-seat focus enters the Salt Market region.
entries.purpose: Give the Salt Market a distinct cloth, rope, crate, and empty-commerce identity without implying unseen merchants or hidden dialogue.
layers: Open wind passing through empty stalls
sonic_requirements: Canvas must be recognizable without becoming a constant flap
Market texture remains materially distinct from ordinary houses
Localized layer may fade cleanly into the Lowest Tide base bed

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce sharp cloth snaps and metal contacts while retaining canvas, rope, and empty-stall motion.

generator_guidance.prompt: Localized seamless ambience for an empty salt market in a drowned storybook harbor: weather-torn canvas awnings, rope against wet timber poles, sparse crate settling, occasional cloudy glass contact, cold wind through abandoned stalls, tactile and restrained, no people, no speech, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: busy marketplace, crowd voices, coins, cheerful commerce, circus tent, rhythmic flapping, pirate tavern, music, speech, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Salt Market is defined by pale canvas, rope, wet timber, and empty ordered commerce inside the same Drowned Harbor material world.

entries.approval_boundary: Preproduction localized ambience brief only; no final loop, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Bellhouse Square Resonance Bed
entries.trigger: The public board focus enters Bellhouse Square or the Bellhouse mechanism becomes the active public objective.
entries.purpose: Establish rope, tower, brass, and ledger tension without embedding a full bell strike or hidden faction information in the loop.
layers: Bell rope movement under light tension
Very low brass body vibration without a strike
Wet ledger pages and index-tab movement
Distant structures answering through air or water
sonic_requirements: No full bell strike may occur inside the permanent loop
The mechanism should feel ordered rather than haunted at random
High Water variant may carry more resonance through water
No layer may identify a hidden Bellmarked seat

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce low resonance and rope snaps while keeping the ordered tower-and-ledger identity audible.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless localized ambience for an original maritime Bellhouse: long ropes under slight tension, swollen tower timber, restrained oxidized-brass body resonance without a bell strike, wet ledger pages, index tabs, distant structures answering faintly, ordered supernatural mechanism, storybook folk horror, no voices, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: church service, constant bell tolling, spoken names, whispering, ghost choir, musical drone, generic haunted house, hidden traitor clue, trailer impact
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Bellhouse indexes public possibilities through rope, brass, wood, and wet records; its ambience never performs a one-time bell event.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ambience brief only; no final Bellhouse identity, hidden-role behavior, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Lighthouse Exterior Wind and Beam Bed
entries.trigger: The public board focus enters the lighthouse exterior region.
entries.purpose: Create vertical isolation, exposed wind, and distant mechanism authority without turning the lighthouse beam into a science-fiction effect.
layers: High coastal wind around stone and slate
sonic_requirements: Wind must leave clear speech space
Beam sweep remains tactile and mechanical
Exterior and lantern-room families must share lens and bearing identity
No musical pitch sequence should dominate

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress wind peaks and shorten beam-sweep texture while preserving tower height and mechanical identity.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless exterior ambience for a tall storybook-horror lighthouse above a drowned harbor: cold exposed coastal wind around wet slate, restrained tower movement, distant thick-glass lens bearing, subtle tactile beam sweep, sea pressure far below, sparse and dialogue-friendly, no speech, no music, no science fiction.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: laser, sci-fi hum, heroic lighthouse, constant thunder, cinematic score, musical motif, spoken calls, foghorn cliché, extreme sub bass
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The lighthouse is a memory-guidance machine made of cloudy glass, oxidized brass, wet slate, and controlled amber light.

entries.approval_boundary: Preproduction ambience brief only; no final beam, wind, spatialization, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Lantern Room Mechanism Bed
entries.trigger: The lantern room becomes the active public decision space.
entries.purpose: Focus attention on the memory-guidance mechanism while preserving silence around Council and final confirmations.
sonic_requirements: Mechanism sounds deliberate and readable rather than busy
Long tails must duck rapidly under Council speech
The base loop excludes irreversible choice confirmations
Profile changes add texture rather than loudness

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce glass-pressure peaks and index-click density while keeping the rotating brass and thick-glass mechanism recognizable.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless restrained ambience inside an original supernatural lighthouse lantern room: slow oxidized-brass ring rotation, thick cloudy glass under pressure, sparse indexed clicks, old bearing friction, cold wind outside the glass, deliberate memory-guidance mechanism, tactile storybook folk horror, no speech, no music, clear space for major decisions.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: steampunk clockwork, sci-fi reactor, laser, musical chord, constant squeal, busy machinery, hidden ending hint, dialogue, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The lantern room guides named memory through cloudy cracked glass and ordered brass indexes; every mechanism sound is deliberate.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ambience brief only; no final mechanism, mix, Council behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Drowned Archive Interior Bed
entries.trigger: The Drowned Archive becomes publicly accessible and active.
entries.purpose: Create a submerged record space where paper, water, shelves, and the inland lighthouse beam compete for attention.
layers: Swollen page separation and shelf strain
Sparse submerged impacts outside the room
sonic_requirements: Paper and water remain distinct
No intelligible historical voices appear in the base bed
Collapse events remain separate one-shots
The ambience must support several visible objective directions without implying one correct answer

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce submerged impacts and shelf-strain peaks while preserving water, paper, brass, and beam layers.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless ambience inside the Drowned Archive: black waist-deep interior water, swollen paper separating, wet shelves under strain, restrained oxidized-brass binding resonance, a tactile inland lighthouse beam, sparse submerged impacts beyond the chamber, original storybook maritime horror, no voices, no music, no collapse event inside the loop.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: magical library, spoken memories, whispering, whale song, full underwater filter, choir, score, constant collapse, fantasy spell sound, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Archive stores damaged histories in swollen paper, black water, wet timber, and ordered brass beneath the same lighthouse mechanism.

required_record: water, paper, and structure source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ambience brief only; no final Archive identity, clue behavior, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: High Water Flooded Streets Bed
entries.trigger: The High Water Terror Turn commits and the transformed public board becomes active.
entries.purpose: Replace exposed-mud stillness with active water routes, loaded structures, and submerged town pressure without becoming a continuous disaster roar.
layers: Distant bell resonance carried through water
sonic_requirements: Water movement is active but not a constant wall
Land and water route regions may receive localized overlays
Dialogue space remains available
The stage change is introduced by a separate Terror Turn transition cue
negative_constraints: No permanent transformation event inside the loop

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress current and debris peaks, reduce concurrent overlays, and retain route-specific water and rope identity.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless layered ambience for flooded streets in an original drowned storybook harbor after High Water: active current through lower roads, rope and mooring strain, sparse floating debris, wet dock movement, interior water behind timber walls, distant bell resonance carried through water, tense but dialogue-friendly, no speech, no music, no tsunami roar.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: tsunami, constant waterfall, disaster trailer, screaming crowd, spoken drowned voices, music, transformation event embedded in loop, extreme sub bass, obvious short repetition
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: High Water activates water routes and structural load while preserving the same wet timber, rope, bell, brass, and memory mechanism families.

required_record: water, rope, debris, and structure source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ambience brief only; no final stage mix, route spatialization, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Last Light Reduced Ambience
entries.trigger: Last Light becomes active and the public final-state mechanism is displayed.
entries.purpose: Remove ordinary exploration noise and create focused space around final mechanisms, sacrifices, and ending choices.
layers: Minimal tower or boat strain according to route
sonic_requirements: Silence and negative space are primary design elements
The bed must adapt to valid final mechanisms without revealing hidden outcomes
Ending punctuation remains separate
Profile intensity changes texture rather than loudness

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Preserve quiet intervals and final-mechanism identity while reducing pressure swells and transient structure movement.

generator_guidance.prompt: Seamless minimal Last Light ambience for an original drowned harbor finale: controlled sea pressure, sparse lighthouse lens movement, very distant bell-body resonance, occasional route-specific structure strain, large deliberate quiet intervals, grave and restrained, designed beneath final choices and narration, no music, no speech, no ending reveal.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: musical finale, constant drone, bell toll loop, hidden ending clue, sacrifice cue, trailer rise, loudness escalation, choir, speech, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Last Light removes exploration clutter and leaves the lighthouse, bell, sea pressure, and chosen route as the only remaining public sonic authorities.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ambience brief only; no final ending mix, score, voice, implementation, or production approval.
